description: Plugin-distributed hooks for process-improvement. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: review this process-improvement deliverable against the §3 house opinions (capability needs a stability + spec context, sigma needs the 1.5σ convention, no solution-jumping, a fix needs a control plan). Set PROCESS_IMPROVEMENT_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
